summary: Completed testing of 3 major features: (1) Admin Coupons page rewrite - merged view with filters, (2) Worker Data Entry page - form + own entries, (3) Admin Data Entry page - all entries with filters. All 21 backend tests passed, all UI tests passed.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in worker rankings table - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality (pre-existing from iteration 8)

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Coupons: GET /api/admin/coupons returns merged campaign + legacy coupons with customer_name, customer_phone, campaign_name, worker_name, branch_name, source fields
Admin Coupons: Status filter (AVAILABLE, SOLD, etc.) and Source filter (campaign, legacy, all) work correctly
Admin Coupons: Search by customer name/mobile/coupon code works
Admin Coupons: Delete endpoint DELETE /api/admin/coupons/{id} works with force=true option
Worker Data Entry: POST /api/worker/data-entry creates entry with validation (customer_name, mobile_number, city required)
Worker Data Entry: GET /api/worker/data-entry/me returns only worker's own entries
Worker sidebar correctly shows 'Data Entry' instead of 'My Sales'
Worker Data Entry page does NOT have Download Excel button (correct)
Admin Data Entry: GET /api/admin/data-entry returns all entries with workers dropdown for filtering
Admin Data Entry: GET /api/admin/data-entry/export returns data for Excel export
seed_data_creation: Created test data entries via pytest and Playwright UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: (1) Admin Coupons page shows 3,791 campaign coupons + 0 legacy coupons with merged view, filters (status, source), search, Excel export, photo preview, delete functionality. (2) Worker Data Entry page has form with customer_name, mobile_number, city, notes fields and shows worker's own entries (4 entries after tests). Worker sidebar shows 'Data Entry' not 'My Sales'. No Download Excel button for worker. (3) Admin Data Entry page shows all entries (4 total) with search, worker filter dropdown, date filters, and Download Excel button. Database: manual_customer_entries collection has 4 entries, campaign_coupons has 3,791 entries (all AVAILABLE).

verifications: GET /api/admin/coupons returns merged view with campaign + legacy coupons
Response includes: id, code, status, customer_name, customer_phone, campaign_name, worker_name, branch_name, source
Status filter works (tested AVAILABLE filter)
Source filter works (tested campaign and legacy filters)
Search by coupon code works
Download Excel button present
Delete button with confirmation dialog present
Photo column shows thumbnail (no photos in current data)
POST /api/worker/data-entry creates entry with customer_name, mobile_number, city, notes, worker_name
GET /api/worker/data-entry/me returns only worker's own entries
Form validation requires customer_name, mobile_number, city
Worker sidebar shows 'Data Entry' (not 'My Sales')
No Download Excel button visible for worker
Form submission works - entry appears in table immediately
GET /api/admin/data-entry returns all entries with worker filter dropdown
Search by name/mobile/city works
Worker filter dropdown populated with unique workers
Date filters present (date_from, date_to)
Download Excel button present
GET /api/admin/data-entry/export returns data for Excel export
